name: FRANKLIN FINANCIAL SERVICES CORP /PA/
summary: Part I General Franklin Financial Services Corporation (the Corporation) was organized as a Pennsylvania business corporation on June1, 1983 and is a registered bank holding company under the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956, as amended (the BHCA).
